title: Implement /config resource handlers per LCI spec
description: Implement /config, /config/radio, /config/identity CoAP resources per LCI spec 17.5.2. GET returns current config as CBOR, PUT updates config. Include validation, persistence hooks, and restart-required signaling. Integrate with existing Zephyr settings subsystem if applicable.
acceptance_criteria: coap-client GET/PUT on /config/* works; changes persist across reboot; invalid config rejected with 4.00
close_reason: Implemented coap_config.c: GET/PUT /config, /config/radio, GET /config/identity, verified on EC2
